no: Two joinable NPCs: Zaiya (CG half-elf wild mage, found in slaver ship, Slums District — good/neutral PC only) and Kiara (NE human monk). Includes optional tougher encounters and monk HLA revisions.
sum: This mod introduces two joinable NPCs, Zaiya and Kiara, to your game. Zaiya is a Chaotic Good half-elven wild mage, and Kiara is a Neutral Evil human monk. Zaiya can be found inside the slaver ship (Slums District) and will join your party only if your character is of either good or neutral alignment.

co.n: Kiara-Zaiya for BG2 with vanilla sound sets
co.no: Installs both NPCs with standard BG2 sound sets.
co.tp2n: Kiara-Zaiya for BG2 with vanilla sound sets

co.n: Kiara-Zaiya for BG2 with custom sound sets (English only)
co.no: Installs both NPCs with custom voice sets (English only).
co.tp2n: Kiara-Zaiya for BG2 with custom sound sets (English only)

co.n: Alternate Monk High level abilities by TG Maestro
co.no: Replaces default monk HLAs with alternate set.
co.tp2n: Alternate Monk High level abilities by TG Maestro

co.n: Original Amaralis battles in chapters 2 and 6
co.no: Restores Amaralis battle encounters in chapters 2 and 6.
Level 20 monk vampire Kiara with level drain and undead powers.

co.n: Jao and party for SoA: another tough fight
co.no: Adds a tough Jao encounter in Shadows of Amn.
co.tp2n: Jao and party for SOA: another tough fight

co.n: Tougher Irenicus at the Tree of Life
co.no: Tougher but still feasible Irenicus encounter at the Tree of Life.
co.tp2n: Tougher Irenicus at the Tree of life
